final:
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input B2,
    input C1,
    input C2,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output X
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) | (VPWR & !VGND) = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) | (VPWR & !VGND);
  wire temp2_(VPB & !VNB) = (VPB & !VNB);
  assign X = temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) | (VPWR & !VGND) | temp2_(VPB & !VNB);

endmodule
